module.name: native
module.purpose: Groups the concrete native tool programs by category. file/ owns filesystem tools (read, write, list, search); shell/ owns native shell command execution. Every native tool's invoke() is now implemented (no longer a panic stub): each parses the JSON call via marix_common::external::serde_json, performs the real filesystem or shell work, and returns a JSON result string (or a {"error":..} JSON on failure). mod.rs is re-export wiring only.

childModules.name: file
childModules.purpose: Filesystem native tool programs: ReadFile, WriteFile, ListDirectory, and SearchText, each with an implemented invoke() that parses the JSON call and performs std::fs work.

childModules.name: shell
childModules.purpose: Native shell command execution tool program: ShellExecute, with an implemented invoke() that runs the command through the OS shell via std::process::Command.
